name: No-Bake Fruit Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the pitted dates, chopped nuts, raisins, chopped dried apricots, and dried figs in a food processor.
2. Process until finely chopped.
3. Stir in the optional mini chocolate chips and peanut butter chips.
4. Line an 8-inch square baking dish with foil and spray with nonstick cooking spray.
5. Press the mixture firmly into the prepared pan.
6. Chill the bars until set, then cut into squares.
